HPSMUN 2026

HPSMUN 2026 gathers India’s most discerning young delegates for two days of substantive negotiation, policy authorship, and diplomatic exchange — convened on the historic grounds of Hyderabad Public School, Warangal.

Dates25 — 26 Jul 2026
VenueHPS · Warangal
Delegate Fee₹ 800
Register Now→Explore Committees
UNGA
UNDP
WHO
Lok Sabha
United Nations Development Programme◆United Nations General Assembly◆World Health Organization◆Lok Sabha◆Hyderabad Public School · Warangal◆
United Nations Development Programme◆United Nations General Assembly◆World Health Organization◆Lok Sabha◆Hyderabad Public School · Warangal◆
The Standard

Built for serious diplomatic exchange — not theatre.

Each committee is convened with the rigour of a working forum. Delegates are expected to research deeply, write substantively, and negotiate with the posture of practitioners — not performers.

  • Research
  • Negotiation
  • Policy Writing
  • International Relations
Duration
00Days

Two consecutive days of substantive debate.

Participation
₹0

A single delegate fee. Inclusive of all sessions.

Forums
00Committees

Hand-picked agendas across global and national bodies.

The Forums

The diplomatic centerpiece.

Four committees. Four agendas authored with deliberate ambition — drawn from the most pressing questions in global and Indian governance.

Committee · I
UNDP

United Nations Development Programme

Agenda

“Sovereign debt restructuring and its consequences for development finance in the Global South.”

Delegates will examine the architecture of multilateral lending, conditionality, and the legitimacy of restructuring frameworks in an era of compounding crises.

N° 01 / 04
Committee · II
UNGA

United Nations General Assembly

Agenda

“The militarisation of outer space and the future of the Outer Space Treaty regime.”

A plenary deliberation on dual-use technologies, anti-satellite capabilities, and the contours of a renewed framework for orbital governance.

N° 02 / 04
Committee · III
WHO

World Health Organization

Agenda

“Pandemic preparedness and equitable access to medical countermeasures.”

From the Pandemic Accord to compulsory licensing — delegates will negotiate the instruments that determine who lives, and at what price.

N° 03 / 04
Committee · IV
LS

Lok Sabha

Agenda

“Federalism, fiscal devolution, and the contested architecture of Indian cooperative governance.”

A simulation of the Lower House examining the constitutional and political dimensions of centre–state economic relations.

N° 04 / 04
The Office

The leadership of HPSMUN 2026.

A secretariat drawn from accomplished delegates and chairs across India’s most competitive circuits. Stewards of the conference’s standard and tone.

The Pathway

Attend HPSMUN 2026.

Dates
25 — 26 July 2026
Venue
Hyderabad Public School, Warangal
Delegate Fee
₹ 800 / delegate
Eligibility
Students, Grades IX — XII
Open Application →
  1. 01
    Application

    Submit your delegate application with committee preferences and a brief statement of intent.

  2. 02
    Allocation

    Receive your committee and portfolio. Background guides are dispatched on the day of allocation.

  3. 03
    Confirmation

    Confirm participation with payment of the ₹800 delegate fee. A formal invitation follows.

  4. 04
    Conference

    Convene at Hyderabad Public School, Warangal on 25–26 July 2026 for two days of substantive debate.

The Return

Why delegates return.

  • 01Research ExcellenceSubstantive guides authored to demand depth, not summary.
  • 02Public SpeakingModerated caucuses calibrated for clarity, restraint, and persuasion.
  • 03NetworkingA delegate body curated for substance — peers worth remembering.
  • 04Diplomatic SimulationProcedure honoured. Crisis introduced with intent, not spectacle.
  • 05LeadershipBloc-building, drafting, and the quiet authorship of consensus.
In the Words
The Venue

Hyderabad Public School,
Warangal.

A historic campus of colonnaded halls and quiet, deliberate spaces — a fitting ground for an assembly that prizes contemplation as much as oratory.

Established
1923
City
Warangal
State
Telangana
Distinction
Academic Heritage
HPSMUN 2026
Be Vigilant · MMXXVI

An annual convening of the Hyderabad Public School Model United Nations Society, Warangal. Convened in the tradition of serious diplomatic exchange.
